channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tragic cross-border police pursuit ends in fatal crash
item.description: A man has died following a high-speed police chase that crossed the Queensland and New South Wales border. The incident began when a 25-year-old man, believed to be armed with a firearm, was reported ...

item.title: Philippine exorcism center bridges faith and mental health care
item.description: The Philippine School for Exorcists, located in Makati City, serves as a unique institution training priests and clergy from across Asia to address spiritual and psychological challenges. Established ...

item.title: Canadian Sports Broadcaster Rod Black Chronicles His Career in New Book
item.description: Nova Scotia's iconic sports broadcaster Rod Black has released a new book detailing his illustrious career spanning decades in Canadian media. The book, which serves as a comprehensive chronicle of hi...

item.title: Lungi Ngidi's evolution as a versatile fast bowler
item.description: Lungi Ngidi's mastery of the slower ball and adaptability as a fast bowler have solidified his status as a fan favorite in South African cricket. The article highlights his journey from being overshad...

item.title: Carmina Villarroel at Zoren Legaspi: Mga aral mula sa matagal na kasal
item.description: Ang artikulong ito ay nag-uulat ng mga kakaibang estratehiya at tip para sa mapanatag na relasyon, partikular na ang naging sukat ng Carmina Villarroel at Zoren Legaspi. Ang kasal nila, na nagsimula n...

item.title: Tornado warning issued for Clearwater County after traffic camera captures storm in central Alberta
item.description: A tornado was captured on camera by a traffic surveillance system in central Alberta, prompting a warning for communities in Clearwater County. The incident occurred on July 18, 2026, and highlights t...

item.title: DOJ allows TikTok on government devices after ownership transfer
item.description: The Department of Justice (DOJ) has announced that federal employees can now download TikTok on their official government devices, reversing a 2022 ban. This decision follows a legal change triggered ...

item.title: Telugu film explores domestic strife and hidden violence through a housewife's journey
item.description: The Telugu film 'Maa Inti Bangaaram' follows Swarna, a former revolutionary turned housewife, as she navigates the complexities of her new life. Her attempts to win over her in-laws, who distrust her ...

item.title: US and Iran Escalate Military Conflict with Airstrikes and Retaliation
item.description: The United States launched airstrikes on Iran following the killing of two American troops in Jordan and the disappearance of a third, prompting Iran to retaliate by targeting US military bases in Kuw...

item.title: Imo Governor Praises Tinubu's Economic Reforms, Compares Him to Lee Kuan Yew
item.description: Hope Uzodimma, Imo State Governor, has praised President Bola Tinubu for his bold economic reforms, comparing him to Singapore's founding leader, Lee Kuan Yew. Uzodimma said Tinubu's policies are tran...

item.title: Security Forces Kill Five Terrorists in KP Operations
item.description: In a series of coordinated security operations across Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, five terrorists were killed by military and law enforcement agencies. The operations took place in Bannu, Lower South Wazirist...

item.title: Security guard apologises for inappropriate comments during SAPS caravan incident
item.description: A security officer employed by a private security company under a joint law enforcement partnership with SAPS has apologised for making inappropriate remarks during a viral video filmed inside a polic...

item.title: Sonam Wangchuk Admitted to Hospital After Fall
item.description: Sonam Wangchuk, an Indian environmentalist and former Jammu and Kashmir Lieutenant Governor, has been hospitalized following a fall. The incident occurred while he was in a remote area, and his condit...

item.title: WNBA Suspends Coach Brondello for Inappropriate Comment on Angel Reese
item.description: WNBA coach Sandy Brondello has been suspended for one game without pay after making an 'inappropriate' comment about Atlanta star Angel Reese following a game. The incident occurred during a match whe...

item.title: Chinar Book Festival promotes literacy and cultural exchange in Kashmir
item.description: The third edition of the Chinar Book Festival, held in Srinagar, attracted thousands of attendees despite summer heat, highlighting its significance as Jammu and Kashmir's largest literary event. Inau...

item.title: China's Growing Influence in Global Governance: An Outsider's View
item.description: The article explores China's significant role in shaping global governance, highlighting its transformation from a struggling economy to a global power. It discusses the ECOWAS Headquarters project as...

item.title: U.S. Marshals Arrest Tate Brothers in Miami on UK Extradition Request for Rape and Sex Trafficking Charges
item.description: Andrew and Tristan Tate, social media influencers with dual American and British citizenship, were arrested by U.S. Marshals in Miami on July 18, 2026, following a UK extradition request. The UK Crown...

item.title: Cayetanos Address Impeachment Concerns via Facebook Live
item.description: The article discusses the Cayetanos' decision to address impeachment-related issues through a Facebook Live session, highlighting their efforts to engage the public on matters of political accountabil...

item.title: ICE Agent With History of Domestic Abuse Killed During Traffic Stop
item.description: A Washington Post report detailed the violent history of David Brouillette, an ICE agent who fatally shot Colombian man Joan Sebastian Guerrero during a traffic stop in Maine. The incident follows all...

item.title: Eurovision Contest Winner Announced: A New Era Begins
item.description: The Eurovision Song Contest, one of the most iconic and long-standing international music competitions, has concluded with a decisive victory for the song 'Dancing Queen' performed by the Swedish arti...
